title: gelseminum cuspidatum
intro: Gelseminum cuspidatum, also known as Chinese foxglove or yuan zhi, is a plant species in the Gelsemiaceae family native to China and Taiwan. It contains toxic compounds, including gelsemine and gelsemidine, but when used in traditional Chinese medicine, Gelsemium has been found to have medicinal properties that can help alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Gelsemium include its potential to treat anxiety, insomnia, and neurological disorders due to its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, Gelsemium is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules, although it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
